title: Croatian Stew with Applesauce and Glowing Garnish
description: A hearty and flavorful stew from Croatia, served with a sweet applesauce and a glowing garnish for a touch of whimsy.

ingredients.name: Glowing garnish
ingredients.notes: such as edible glitter or glowing sugar

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened.
Add carrot and potato and cook for 5 minutes.
Add stew meat and cook until browned.
Add tomato paste and red wine (if using) and stir to combine.
Add enough water to cover the stew meat and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
Serve hot with applesauce and glowing garnish on top.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs (such as parsley or thyme) if desired.
